variants.title: HiFi Filter SAOH 10075UBBSC Engine Breather Filter
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SAOH 10075UBBSC Engine Breather Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAOH 10075UBBSC Engine Breather Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAOH 10075UBBSC is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: ENGINE BREATHER FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 153.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 143.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 135.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 260.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 210.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 118.0 mm, No. Check Valves: 1
